sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n65959" key="meleo/ponos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μελεό-πονος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n65959.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">having done wretchedly</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0085.tlg004.perseus-grc1:960" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">960</biblScope> </bibl> (lyr.).</sense> </entryFree>
